stemHtml: You are flying to a destination with limited fuel services and a short runway. To minimise fuel uplift requirements at the destination you plan to land with the maximum amount of fuel possible. What factor might limit your landing mass?

options.a: High OAT, which lowers mass as it leads to a higher groundspeed.
options.b: Low OAT, which lowers mass as it leads to a lower groundspeed.
options.c: A runway upslope as it increases landing distance.
options.d: A runway downslope as it leads to a reduced landing distance.
